reviews.review_description: I open the game. I answer a phone call. I pick up a pill that's as far as the game lets me go. It doesn't even properly load the discretions.

At start up you’re able to answer the call from Morpheus where upon answering he is giving the option to either, eat the blue pill and return back to your normal life or going down the ra Jeff this morning for lunch or dinner dinner and lunch and lunch lunch with him or something else else I will will have the the next one to to you guys guys and I’ll let them go a
A cat is screaming and a poorly drawn person is shooting. That’s it. It’s like being stuck in a mall with the fire alarm going off. It’s SO bad

It's weird, I don't know what this is supposed to be - I feel like I'm stuck in a Windows 95 screensaver, and sometimes random clips from the movie play. You can pick up the red or blue pills but nothing happens
